overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dense pine forest at twilight. The character travels along a dirt path, passes a stone campfire, and emerges into a bright mountain valley with snow-capped peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail at twilight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path through dense pine forest with swords on back

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming a dense canopy on both sides of the trail
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
rocky outcrops and boulders alongside the path
dark blue twilight sky visible through tree canopy gaps

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed forest trail surrounded by dense pine trees. The path is dirt with rocky outcrops on the sides, and the dark blue twilight sky is barely visible through the thick canopy above.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail opening toward mountain valley

events.description: forest canopy opens revealing snow-capped mountain peaks in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening trail as snow-capped mountains come into view ahead

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the opening in the forest

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the dense forest opens up slightly, revealing majestic snow-capped mountain peaks in the distance ahead. The trail remains a dirt path but feels less enclosed as the canopy opens.

events.description: warm orange glow from campfire becomes visible ahead in the clearing
character walks past the campfire, moving from shadow into firelight

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a lit stone campfire in a forest clearing

entered.detail: stone-ringed campfire burning with bright orange flames
wooden logs or bench structure near the campfire

segments.scene_description: The character enters a forest clearing where a stone campfire burns with bright orange flames. The warm firelight mixes with the cool twilight as the character approaches and passes the campfire, with snow-capped mountains still visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with panoramic vista

events.description: emerging from forest into bright open mountain valley with sunlit peaks ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright mountain vista, leaving the campfire behind

entered.detail: wide open mountain valley with bright sky and distant peaks

segments.scene_description: Having passed the campfire, the character emerges into a wide-open mountain trail with a panoramic vista. The scene brightens significantly as the dense forest falls behind, revealing snow-capped mountains on both sides backlit by the bright sky ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, twilight forest into a vast, luminous mountain vista. It begins on a narrow dirt trail enclosed by dense pine trees, where the thick canopy obscures most of the dark blue sky. As the character advances, the forest canopy gradually opens to reveal the first glimpse of majestic snow-capped peaks in the distance. The scene then shifts into a clearing where the cool twilight air meets the warm, orange glow of a burning stone campfire before the camera passes the flames. Finally, the environment expands completely as the character emerges from the woods onto a wide-open trail, revealing a bright, panoramic landscape of backlit mountains on both sides.
